product.priceSetting.defaultMaterialPric: Each formula material must have one default price rule.
product.priceSetting.duplicateMaterialCo: Price rule conditions under the same material cannot be duplicated.

product.priceSetting.conditionReferenceI: A referenced formula option or option value no longer exists.
product.priceSetting.formulaVersionRequi: Price settings must bind to an effective formula version.
product.priceSetting.materialPriceMissin: A material in the formula version is missing price rules.
product.priceSetting.materialPriceNotInF: The material price does not belong to the current formula version snapshot.
product.priceSetting.materialPriceRequir: Unit price must be greater than 0 when the formula uses the unit price variable.
product.priceSetting.materialRequired: Select a formula material for the price rule.
product.priceSetting.materialRuleRequire: At least one material price rule is required for this formula version.
product.priceSetting.materialSelectionRe: Select at least one material price.
product.priceSetting.quoteInvalid: The selected options and dimensions cannot be priced.
product.priceSetting.validationRequired: Prices must pass validation before quoting or enabling.
product.shippingTemplate.areaRangeInvali: Shipping template area range is invalid.
product.shippingTemplate.areaRangeCovera: Area ranges for each shipping condition must continuously cover 0 through unlimited.
product.shippingTemplate.areaRangeOverla: Area ranges under the same shipping scenario cannot overlap.
product.shippingTemplate.enabledDeleteDe: Enabled shipping templates cannot be deleted. Disable the template first.

product.shippingTemplate.feeAmountRequir: Shipping amount is required and cannot be negative.

product.shippingTemplate.quoteReferenced: This shipping template is referenced by a quote and cannot be deleted.
product.shippingTemplate.ruleRequired: Shipping template must include manual and motorized rules.
product.shippingTemplate.scenarioInvalid: Shipping scenarios only support manual and motorized.
product.shippingTemplate.statusInvalid: Shipping template status must be enabled or disabled.
product.reference.inUse: The record is referenced by product capability data.

productCenter.masterGuide.description: A focused workspace for the technical team to create, copy-check, maintain, and validate base data used by product configuration.
productCenter.masterGuide.fabricFlowSumm: Prepare material records, fabric series rules, and real fabric SKU data.
productCenter.masterGuide.gapFabricProfi: Create at least one fabric SKU.
productCenter.masterGuide.gapMaterials: Create material records before fabrics or component packs.
productCenter.masterGuide.gapUnits: Create units before entering widths, thickness, and quantities.
productCenter.masterGuide.impactDesc: These base records can be used by configuration answers and component bindings after their required fields are complete.
productCenter.masterGuide.noGaps: Base data is ready for the current stage.
productCenter.masterGuide.stepFabricProf: Enter color, width, thickness, supplier, sample book number, and upload color cards or specs.
productCenter.masterGuide.stepMaterialAt: Use generic attributes for specifications, weight, voltage, protocol, or other material differences.
productCenter.masterGuide.stepMaterialDe: Use one material code as the main identity. External sample and supplier numbers stay as business references.
productCenter.masterGuide.stepUnitsDesc: Confirm units, material types, colors, finishes, control systems, and other reusable choices first.

productCenter.materialType.name: Type Name
productCenter.materialType.selectGroupFi: Select an attribute group on the left first.
productCenter.pricing.batchRuleSettingHi: This rule set atomically overwrites selected materials. Confirm the default and conditional rules before saving.
productCenter.pricing.batchSameGroupRequ: Batch pricing can only apply to one material group at a time.
productCenter.pricing.enabledEditDenied: This sale product is enabled and its price rules are frozen. Disable it before adjusting prices.
productCenter.pricing.confirmOverwriteGe: Rebuild all material prices from the current formula version. Existing rules are cleared and matching rules from the previous version are reused when possible. Continue?
productCenter.pricing.confirmSyncGenerat: Sync every material from the current formula snapshot: add missing materials, remove stale materials, and retain matching price rules. Continue?
productCenter.pricing.conditionFormulaHi: Conditions decide when this unit price rule applies, for example width > 20 or option_SYSTEM == "MOTOR".
productCenter.pricing.noSaleProduct: Maintain sale products before entering price settings.
productCenter.pricing.materialRulesHint: Maintain conditional prices for every material in the current formula version. Rows can only be synchronized from the formula snapshot.
productCenter.pricing.priceRuleSettingHi: Maintain unit prices and material price formulas by condition. Fabrics usually price by area; aluminum, systems, accessories, and packaging can price by formula usage.
productCenter.pricing.priceFormulaTips: Maintain the unit price in the rule field. Formulas support width, drop, areaM2, and MAX/MIN/ROUND/CEIL/FLOOR.
productCenter.pricing.functionHelpMax: Pick the larger value. Example MAX(areaM2, 1): bill at least 1㎡.
productCenter.pricing.functionHelpMin: Pick the smaller value. Example MIN(width, 96): cap width at 96in.
productCenter.pricing.functionHelpRound: Round to nearest integer. Example ROUND(areaM2 * 50): round the result.
productCenter.pricing.title: Product Pricing
productCenter.pricing.unitPriceFormulaHi: Maintain the unit price in the standalone field; formulas display the actual price, for example 50 * MAX(areaM2, 1).
